mapper.select: select o.*, u.real_name as user_name, i.instrument_name from biz_reservation_order o left join sys_user u on u.id = o.user_id left join biz_instrument i on i.id = o.instrument_id where o.id = #{id} and o.deleted = 0 limit 1

select o.*, u.real_name as user_name, i.instrument_name from biz_reservation_order o left join sys_user u on u.id = o.user_id left join biz_instrument i on i.id = o.instrument_id where o.id = #{id} and o.deleted = 0 limit 1 for update

select o.*, u.real_name as user_name, i.instrument_name from biz_reservation_order o left join sys_user u on u.id = o.user_id left join biz_instrument i on i.id = o.instrument_id where o.deleted = 0 order by o.create_time desc

select o.*, u.real_name as user_name, i.instrument_name from biz_reservation_order o left join sys_user u on u.id = o.user_id left join biz_instrument i on i.id = o.instrument_id where o.user_id = #{userId} and o.deleted = 0 order by o.create_time desc

select o.*, u.real_name as user_name, i.instrument_name from biz_reservation_order o left join sys_user u on u.id = o.user_id left join biz_instrument i on i.id = o.instrument_id where o.user_id = #{userId} and o.order_type = #{orderType} and o.deleted = 0 order by o.create_time desc

select o.*, u.real_name as user_name, i.instrument_name from biz_reservation_order o left join sys_user u on u.id = o.user_id left join biz_instrument i on i.id = o.instrument_id where o.deleted = 0 and o.order_status = 'PENDING_AUDIT' and o.submit_time is not null and o.submit_time <= #{cutoffTime} order by o.submit_time asc limit #{limit}
select count(1) from biz_reservation_order where instrument_id = #{instrumentId} and deleted = 0
select count(distinct user_id) from biz_reservation_order where instrument_id = #{instrumentId} and deleted = 0

select count(1) from biz_reservation_order where instrument_id = #{instrumentId} and order_type = 'MACHINE' and deleted = 0 and order_status in ('PENDING_AUDIT', 'WAITING_USE', 'IN_USE') and reserve_start < #{reserveEnd} and reserve_end > #{reserveStart}

select * from biz_reservation_order where instrument_id = #{instrumentId} and order_type = 'MACHINE' and deleted = 0 and order_status in ('PENDING_AUDIT', 'WAITING_USE', 'IN_USE') and reserve_start < #{dayEnd} and reserve_end > #{dayStart} order by reserve_start asc
mapper.insert: insert into biz_reservation_order(order_no, order_type, user_id, instrument_id, department_id, owner_user_id, contact_name, contact_phone, purpose, project_name, reserve_start, reserve_end, reserve_minutes, order_status, audit_status, pay_status, settlement_status, estimated_amount, final_amount, source, submit_time, approve_time, finish_time, cancel_reason, remark, create_time, update_time, deleted) values(#{orderNo}, #{orderType}, #{userId}, #{instrumentId}, #{departmentId}, #{ownerUserId}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{purpose}, #{projectName}, #{reserveStart}, #{reserveEnd}, #{reserveMinutes}, #{orderStatus}, #{auditStatus}, #{payStatus}, #{settlementStatus}, #{estimatedAmount}, #{finalAmount}, #{source}, #{submitTime}, #{approveTime}, #{finishTime}, #{cancelReason}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: update biz_reservation_order set order_status=#{order.orderStatus}, audit_status=#{order.auditStatus}, pay_status=#{order.payStatus}, settlement_status=#{order.settlementStatus}, final_amount=#{order.finalAmount}, approve_time=#{order.approveTime}, finish_time=#{order.finishTime}, cancel_reason=#{order.cancelReason}, remark=#{order.remark}, update_time=#{order.updateTime} where id=#{order.id} and deleted = 0 and order_status = #{expectedStatus}
mapper.select: select get_lock(#{lockKey}, #{timeoutSeconds})
select release_lock(#{lockKey})
